ActionEffectRange (13)

Description: This plugin provides a visual cue on the effect range of the AoE action you just used.
May be used as a supplement/replacement to the actions' VFXs in showing effect range related information, such as where has the action landed and how large an area it covered.

Punchline: Provides a visual cue on the effect range of the AoE action just used.

Aether Compass (12)

Description: This plugin detects certain objects/NPCs such as Aether Currents nearby and shows where they are by various ways, e.g. pointing to their locations on screen and notifying you in Chat.
Currently detects:
- Aether Currents
- Eureka Elementals (by apetih)
- Mob Hunt Elite Marks
- Gathering Points
- [Experimental] Island Sanctuary Gathering Objects and Animals
- [Experimental] Quest-related NPCs/Objects
Note: Because most objects/NPCs are not loaded when they are too faraway or when there are too many entities nearby (such as too many player characters), they will not be detected in this case.
Icon by Lumas Arkfrost

Punchline: Compasses that detect and mark certain nearby objects/NPCs

Tags: map - compass UI 

Author URL Version
Cytraen, yomishino https://kamori.goats.dev/Plugin/PluginMaster 1.6.6.0

AetherFM (13)

Description: In-game radio streaming for Final Fantasy XIV. Enter a stream URL and listen to your favorite radio! Features external plugin integration for Umbra widgets and other plugins via reflection.
Note: AetherFM is only supported on Windows. Due to its reliance on the NAudio library, audio playback is not available on Linux or non-Windows versions of Dalamud.

Punchline: Listen to radio in Eorzea!

Allagan Tools (14)

Description: Allagan Tool's primary purpose is to keep track of items across your characters/retainers/free company. With it's filter system you'll never lose track of items or not know where they should be sorted.
While this is it's primary purpose, it has quite an exhaustive list of other features including:
- Craft planning
- Market board integration
- Item highlighting in inventories when searching/sorting and picking ingredients for crafts
- Item window that includes vendor and source information among other things
- Duty/mob/airship/submarine windows that are fully searchable
- A filtering system that lets you setup complex searches for specific items
- Tooltip integration that'll let you see where the items are on hover

Punchline: Get organized in FFXIV, easily locate/show where to sort items, plan your crafting, and search for mobs, duties, airships, and submarines!

Tags: Inventory 

Author URL Version
Critical_Impact https://kamori.goats.dev/Plugin/PluginMaster 1.14.0.7

Artisan (14)

Auto Pillion (14)

Description: When a party member gets on a mount that supports more than 1 person and is close enough, you will automatically get on.
This plugin is in testing and will have one or more issues, laid out below:
- You may need to right click on the driver once each time you start the game before the plugin will automount their mount. A fix is being investigated.
Please report issues/bugs and post suggestions on the Github website by clicking the globe icon.

AutoMammet (8)

Description: Provides an easy copy and pastable CSV format you can use for island sanctuary spreadsheets. Provides options to export the popularity, future popularity and the current cycle's supply and demand shift values. Both as words and as numbers on a scale of -2 to 2. This plugin does not provide any calculations for Island Sanctuary, merely an export option for your ingame data. Information is exported to your clipboard, so you can paste into any other program.

Punchline: Provides an easy copy and pastable CSV format you can use for island sanctuary spreadsheets.

Better Party Finder (14)

Description: Filter the party finder better.
All vanilla filtering is available, plus:
- Create filter presets to easily switch between
- Whitelist/blacklist specific duties and categories
- Add character names to hide PFs from
- Remove PFs above maximum item level
- Filter on item level range
- Filter on multiple jobs and slots (ex. MCH + GNB available)

Better Playtime (14)

Description: Provides expanded functionality to seamlessly track total playtime.
Use /btime once on each character to add them.

- Customisable output formats such as hours or minutes

- Supports multiple characters

Brio (14)

Description: Brio is suite of tools that gives you advanced control to edit and pose actors during G-Pose.
- Advanced actor posing
- While animating
- Adjust actor positions without them resetting
- Overlay and graphical posing modes
- Creation of up to 239 G-Pose actors
- Creation of custom lights
- Supports integration with Penumbra, Glamourer & Customize+
- Offline import and export of MCDF files onto G-Pose actors
- Play XAT .xcp camera files
- Play/Blend animations of G-Pose actors
- Control Time/Weather in both the Overworld and G-Pose
- Change the active festivals and apply up to 4 at once
- Add/Remove Status Effects of G-Pose actors

Punchline: Enhanced GPosing! A utility for improving the G-Pose experience in FFXIV.

Tags: gpose

Character Panel Refined (14)

Description: Character Panel Refined cuts away useless information from the character panel, while adding useful stats like critical hit and direct hit percentages as well as estimates damage output to allow for easier comparison of gear.

Tags: character ui

Kouzukii https://kamori.goats.dev/Plugin/PluginMaster 1.8.5.0

Character Select+ (14)

Description: Character Select+ allows you to create, save, and instantly apply fully customized character profiles with the press of a button. Switch between your OCs effortlessly using /select CharacterName, applying Penumbra Collections, Glamourer Designs, Customize+ Profiles, and Honorific Titles in one command.
While profile switching is its core purpose, Character Select+ includes additional features:
✔ Advanced Mode – Create custom macro setups for deeper character customization.
✔ Profile-Specific Designs – Use multiple outfits, styles, and looks per character.
✔ Favorites & Sorting – Keep profiles organized by name, date, or importance.
✔ Quick Swap Bar!
✔ One-Click Macro Execution – Run predefined commands instantly when selecting a character.
Whether you're roleplaying, gposing, or just love quick customization, Character Select+ makes switching between characters faster, easier, and seamless.

Tags: Character 

Author URL Version
Kid Icarus https://github.com/IcarusXIV/Character-Select-/raw/master/CharacterSelectPlugin/repo.json 2.1.0.10

Chat 2 (14)

Description: Chat 2 is a complete rewrite of the in-game chat window as a plugin.
It supports:
- Unlimited tabs
- Tabs that always send to a certain channel
- More flexible filtering
- RGB channel colouring
- Completely variable font size
- Sidebar tabs
- Unread counts
- Emotes
- Screenshot mode (obfuscate names)

Chat Tools (14)

Description: Chat Tools was developed to cut through the cluttered chat that can happen at large RP events, or in crowded environments.
Just some of the things you can do with Chat Tools is:
- Filter messages in crowded environments
- Set up windows to watch specific characters of your choice
- Set up windows to watch for messages from a group of characters
- Quickly scan what your selected or hovered targets have said
- Search through your message history
- Preserve messages on logout

Punchline: Filter messages in crowded environments, bringing some sanity back to RP.

Chronofoil (14)

Description: Chronofoil is a plugin that allows you to capture in-game packets for analysis later.
It also allows you to upload a censored version of these captures to a central repository for
preservation and analysis. Privacy controls are at the center of Chronofoil, which is why it
requires two levels of user opt-in, has minimum delays on releasing any submitted user info,
and allows users to delete their submitted data at any time.

Punchline: Opt-in Crowdsourced packet capturing tool

Dailies Checklist (14)

Description: A quality-of-life overlay that helps you track daily and weekly reset activities in Final Fantasy XIV. Features include:
- Categorized checklist for daily and weekly tasks
- Auto-detection for supported activities (roulettes, cactpot, beast tribes, etc.)
- Manual tracking for activities that cannot be auto-detected
- Automatic reset at daily/weekly reset times
- Persistent state across sessions
- Customizable task list and UI settings
Commands:
/dailies - Toggle the main checklist window

Punchline: Track your daily and weekly FFXIV activities in one convenient overlay.

Tags: checklist 

Author URL Version
Logan Summerlin https://github.com/Logan-Summerlin/MMORPG-Addon/raw/master/pluginmaster.json 1.0.0.1

DeepDungeonDex (3)

Description: A live bestiary for Deep Dungeon. Shows target mob aggro type, a subjective threat level, vulnerability to stun, and a general overview of notable mechanics. Threat level is meant to be taken with a grain of salt, is aimed towards solo players, and assumes a general familiarity with
deep dungeon mechanics and the class being played. Information is accurate to the best of my knowledge based on crowdsourced information, but please open an issue on the GitHub or ping me in either the Deep Dungeons or QuickLauncher Discord servers if anything is found to be inaccurate or if you'd like to make a report on untested data.

Author URL Version
Strati https://github.com/Haplo064/DalamudPlugins/raw/refs/heads/master/pluginmaster.json 1.1.6.2

Encore (14)

Description: One-Click Dance & Emote Mod Management
Create presets for your favorite dance and emote mods, then activate them instantly with a single click or custom chat commands. Automatically handles Penumbra mod priorities, conflict resolution, and mod option switching so your animations always show correctly.
Key Features: Custom chat commands, automatic priority management, smart emote detection, idle/sit/doze pose support, preset folders, icon picker, drag & drop organization, and align-to-target for group emotes. Perfect for anyone who uses multiple animation mods.

Fashion Report Calculator / Dye Finder (13)

Description: This is the new and improved Fashion Report System. This plugin will allow you to open a window that will show you what your fashion report status is vs the current week's theme.
There are a few parts to this. Since the only way to get Fashion Report for the week to my knowledge is speaking to Masked Rose after Tuesdays reset, this plugin takes the first person who does talk to him and updates everyone else. So only one person per week needs to speak to Masked Rose.
You can click on a theme and pull all the known items for that theme for that specific slot. You also get a very detailed breakdown of how much points you are getting based on what you are currently wearing.
The plugin also stores the attempts of those using the mod (just the data from fashioncheck, no user information) so that we can figure out the dyes faster and share information faster. The information in this table is wiped every week since once we discover the dyes, it is useless.
I still have more upgrades to do, including adding a dye window and the window that will help calculate the weekly dyes. I already have an idea of how I want to write them, so it shouldn't take me too long. If you have suggestions on how I can upgrade this, please share with me on github!
Credit for the program goes to it's original creator, WillWolf76, who wrote this for me originally.
When this plugin updates the database, it also updates my Discord Bot which you can set up to post fashion report each week. It's set to update on Tuesdays and Fridays (week start and dye information added). Link to add the Discord Bot is in the about section.

Punchline: Know your Fashion Report points on the spot and help crowdsource new items and dyes!

Tags: Fashion Report Utility 

Author URL Version
The Redheaded Witch & WillWolf76 https://kamori.goats.dev/Plugin/PluginMaster 1.2.0.0
The Redheaded Witch, WillWolf76 https://github.com/WilliamW1979/FFXIV/raw/main/repository.json 1.0.0
The Redheaded Witch, WillWolf76 https://github.com/WilliamW1979/FFXIV/raw/refs/heads/main/repository.json 1.0.0

Fun Fact Countdown (14)

Description: Start a countdown that sends fun facts to your chat!
'/ffcd' to open the settings.
'/ffcd ...' to begin the fun fact countdown.
For example, '/ffcd 15 10 5 0' will start a 15 second countdown and share a fun fact to your chosen chat channel (Party by default) at the 10 second, 5 second, and 0 second marks!
***If no intervals are given, your party will enjoy a fun fact for every second of the countdown.

Tags: countdown

Lucifurr https://github.com/LucifurrMorningstar/Dalamud/raw/main/repo.json 1.4.3.0

Heliosphere (14)

Description: Heliosphere is a mod manager and platform designed to work directly with
Penumbra. It enables efficient downloads and fast installs to let you get back
to the fun part of mods: using them.
Heliosphere supports:
- Direct install to Penumbra
- Compressed and deduplicated (read: small) downloads
- Automatic updates (optional)
- Version history
- Mod changelogs
- Pictures in Penumbra
- And more
Give Heliosphere a try, and see if you can't say goodbye to any old mod
platform you were using before.

Punchline: An efficient mod manager and platform that integrates directly with Penumbra.

Tags: mods

Ice's Cosmic Exploration (ICE) (14)

Description: The one-stop shop to your cosmic exploration needs! This plugin is meant to be a collective source of being able to grind out your gather and crafter relics, while also being able to help grind out the score to 500k on each class for that sleek black mech that you want ~.
- Has the ability to re-roll missions for you until you get the desired one that you want to farm
- Crafters can be fully automated with support of artisan.
- Fisher can also be fully automated with the support of AutoHook and Navmesh
- Botanist/Miner only need Navmesh, thanks to having gathering built in directly to the plugin <3.
- Setup what items you want to buy from the shop for cosmocredits, or spend your planetary tokens on the cosmowheel of fortune!

Punchline: Welcome to, the dark side of, the MOOOON

Tags: Gatherers 

Author URL Version

Kiko Guide (7)

Description: Comprehensive guides for duty content such as Dungeons, Trials and Alliance Raids.
Key features:
- Automatically open a guide when entering a duty
- Neat user interface that scales well at small sizes
- A short-text mode for easier reading & accessibility
- Anti-spoiler protections by default
- Built-in guide editor
- Integrations with your favourite plugins
& more to come!

Macro Chain Redux (14)

Description: Allows for a macro to continue onto the next macro by using '/nextmacro' on the last line of a macro.
Adding '/nextmacro' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #02
Adding '/nextmacro down' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #11
Also allows executing any macro from chat using '/runmacro'
You can repeat a macro by using /runmacro inside the macro followed by the number of the macro you're editing
Using '/macrocancel' will stop the currently running macro

Punchline: A modified fork of the old Macro Chain that allows you to run multiple macros one after the other (or repeat them).

Tags: macro 

Author URL Version
Aida Enna https://github.com/Aida-Enna/XIVPlugins/raw/main/repo.json 2.1.1.5
Aida Enna https://github.com/FXStrato/ffxiv-plugins-uni/raw/main/repo.json 2.1.1.5

Macro Mate (14)

Description: Macro Mate lets you store and run an unlimited number of macros. You can also bind macros to normal macro slots.
For example, you can:
- Automatically swap in the correct raid macro when you enter an instance
- Store longer macros and automatically split them across multiple macro slots.
- Use almost any icon in the game for your Macros

Punchline: Store and run an unlimited number of macros. Bind them to normal macro slots.

Tags: macros 

Author URL Version
grittyfrog https://kamori.goats.dev/Plugin/PluginMaster 1.0.27.0

Description: Macro Mate lets you store and run an unlimited number of macros. You can also bind macros to normal macro slots.
For example, you can:
- Automatically swap in the correct raid macro when you enter an instance
- Store longer macros and automatically split them across multiple macro slots.
- Use almost any icon in the game for your Macros

Macrology 

Description: Adds a better macro system to the game. Macrology allows for macros of infinite length, adds looping, allows comments, supports pausing, allows you to run multiple macros at once, and supports fractional waits.

Punchline: Adds a better macro system to the game.

Master Of Puppets (14)

Description: FFXIV plugin that lets you create and send custom actions (similar to in-game macros), either locally or via chat-based broadcast. It supports broadcasting actions to multiple clients locally, or through in-game chat channels such as Party, Linkshell, and Cross-World Linkshell. Use it to trigger custom actions like emotes, minions, mounts, fashion changes, and more.

MonsterDex (14)

Description: A live bestiary for Deep Dungeon. Shows target mob aggro type, a subjective threat level, status vulnerabilities, and a general overview of notable mechanics. Threat level is meant to be taken with a grain of salt, is aimed towards solo players, and assumes a general familiarity with deep dungeon mechanics and the class being played. Information is accurate to the best of my knowledge based on crowdsourced information, but I could use your help! Please open an issue on the GitHub if you'd like to correct inaccurate or untested data. Original by Strati

Punchline: Live monster data.

Tags: deep dungeon

WildWolf https://kamori.goats.dev/Plugin/PluginMaster 2.14.0.0

- Login

Neevie Auto-Mammet Emote Generator (7)

Description: Neevie Auto-Mammet Emote Generator accepts a series of quotes provided by you, the user.
A random quote is selected and inserted into the emote, and the emote is split into chunks if the string is too long to fit in a single emote.
Special thanks to Infi's BetterPlaytime and Lady Defile's Wordsmith, from whose code I took a lot of ... inspiration ...

Punchline: Now you too can be annoyed to death by a mammet that spews quotes at you.

Tags: emote 

Author URL Version
GlassLionCharlie https://github.com/CharlieDelune/DalamudPlugins/raw/master/repo.json 0.1.1

Neko Fans (14)

Description: Shows you an image of a random neko character. Click on the image to view the next one.
You can choose different image sources, allowing you to look at Catboys, Waifus, Cats, Dogs and more.
Supported APIs:
nekos.best, Nekos.life, Dog CEO, The Cat API, Pic.re, Waifu.im, Waifu.pics and shibe.online
Warning: You might see naughty images

Punchline: Frustrated in a dungeon? Look at a cute cat girl!

Tags: anime UI

NoSoliciting (14)

Description: Customisable chat and Party Finder filtering. In addition to letting
you filter anything from chat and PF, it comes with built-in filters
for the following:
- RMT (both gil and content)
- FC ads
- RP ads
- Phishing messages
- Static recruitment
- Trade ads
- Community ads
- Any PF with an item level over the max

Portrait Fixer (14)

Description: When you click 'Update Gear Set', this plugin will automatically update and save your portait to match your new glam.
This plugin is in testing and will have one or more issues, laid out below:
- Rarely, a glitched desynth window will pop up when saving the gearset instead of it saving the portait. This is being investigated, closing the window and swapping classes seems to fix it.
Please report issues/bugs and post suggestions on the Github website by clicking the globe icon.

Questionable (14)

Description: A small quest helper plugin designed to automatically do your quests for you where possible. Utilizes navmesh to automatically travel to all quest waypoints and (attempts to) complete all steps along the way (excluding dungeons, single-player duties and combat).
Not all quests are supported.
Required Plugins: vnavmesh, TextAdvance, Lifestream

Punchline: A tiny quest helper plugin.

Tags: quest

Questionable Plus (14)

Description: The actively maintained and improved quest helper plugin for a smoother questing experience.
This plugin automates quests with enhanced pathing, reliable combat integration (e.g., Boss Mod and Wrath Combo), and consistent stability. It leverages tools like Vnavmesh for precise navigation, LifeStream for efficient travel, and TextAdvance for dialogue handling, keeping pace with game updates and user needs.
Originally created by Liza Carvelli.

Punchline: The ultimate quest helper plugin, actively maintained and feature-packed.

Rotation Solver (10)

Description: Analyses combat information in every frame and finds the best action.
This means almost all the information available in one frame in combat, including the status of all players in the party, the status of any hostile targets, skill cooldowns, the MP and HP of characters, the location of characters, casting status of the hostile target, combo, combat duration, player level, etc.
Then, it will highlight the best action on the hot bar, or help you to click on it.
It is designed for GENERAL COMBAT, not for savage or ultimate. Use it carefully.

Punchline: Analyses combat information in every frame and finds the best action.

Tags: combat jobs 

Author URL Version
ArchiTed https://github.com/ArchiDog1998/DalamudPlugins/raw/main/pluginmaster.json 5.1.13
croizat https://github.com/ryon5541/dalamud-repo-up/raw/main/ffxiv_custom_repo.json 3.6.3.0

Description: Analyses combat information every frame and finds the best action.
This means almost all the information available in one frame in combat, including the status of all players in the party, the status of any hostile targets, skill cooldowns, the MP and HP of characters, the location of characters, casting status of the hostile target, combo, combat duration, player level, etc.
Then, it will highlight the best action on the hot bar, or help you to click on it.
It is designed for `general combat`, not for savage or ultimate. Use it carefully.

Rotation Solver Reborn (CN) (14)

Description: 逐帧分析战斗情况，并找出下一帧最适合使用的技能。
这意味着几乎所有战斗中可用的信息都在一帧中，包括队伍中所有玩家的状态、任何敌对目标的状态、技能冷却时间、角色的MP/HP、角色的位置、敌对目标的施法状态、连击、战斗时长、玩家等级等。
然后，它会在快捷栏上高亮显示最佳行动，或帮助你点击它。
它是为“日常战斗”设计的，不适用于零式或者绝境战。请谨慎使用

Punchline: RSR 自动输出/循环（粗制滥造汉化版），逐帧分析战斗情况，并找出下一帧最适合使用的技能。

Tags: combat jobs

Settings Enhanced (12)

Description: Settings Enhanced allows you to create zone-specific system and character configurations; For example, you could lower the amount of rendered players in Limsa, or mute other players sound effects while in stellar crafting zones. Your original configuration data is stored and automatically re-applies when entering an area with you have not created zone setting for, or when disabling the plugin/closing the game.
It is recommended that you create regular backups whilst using this plugin incase something does does break - upon install a check will be ran to see if at least one system/character configuration backup has been created; You will not be able to use the plugin if until you have created one.

Punchline: Per-zone system and character configurations

Author URL Version
Blooym https://kamori.goats.dev/Plugin/PluginMaster 0.1.6.0

Show Gear (9)

Description: Normally the Fitting Room defaults to showing you just the piece of gear you’re trying on. This plugin inverts that behaviour: when you launch the game, the Fitting Room (plus Item Dyeing and Glamour Plate Selection) will show all your gear by default.
NB: there are some oddities to how Item Dyeing and Glamour Plate Selection behave when this plugin is doing its thing. If you’d rather it not touch those windows at all, there’s an option for that (and more details about the problem) in the settings.
Icon adapted from OpenMoji, CC BY-SA 4.0.

Punchline: Shows your gear in the Fitting Room by default.

Author URL Version
ash https://kamori.goats.dev/Plugin/PluginMaster 1.2.1.2

SkyeMeter 2.0 (14)

Description: SkyeMeter connects to IINACT to display real-time DPS, HPS, and encounter statistics with a customizable ImGui interface. Features include pet damage merging, dual DPS/HPS tables, history tracking, and extensive visual customization. Additionally, we calculate the actual healing done, instead of merging healing and overhealing, for a REAL display of the healing done by each Combatant.

Punchline: A modern DPS meter overlay for FFXIV

Splatoon (14)

Description: Splatoon is a powerful accessibility tool. It revolutionizes gameplay with its custom waymark system, offering the ability to create unlimited grouped waymarks, labels, and actor indicators with exacting pixel precision. This feature empowers players by making crucial objects and events more visually discernible, thereby facilitating quicker reactions. However, it's important to note that the plugin does not come pre-loaded with presets. Players have the freedom to craft their own or import existing ones, offering a personalized touch to their gaming experience.

Punchline: Redefining FFXIV navigation with unlimited, precise waymarks.

Tags: Utility

Steam Recording Enhanced (14)

Description: Enhance Steam Game Recording by automatically adding configurable in-game events to the timeline, allowing for easy rewinding and clipping. Rewind to the moment of your death to reassure yourself that you did dodge the AOE before it went off and that the game does hate you personally with greater efficiency than ever!

Non-steam users will have to follow a setup guide located in the configuration's window Status tab to get everything working.

Punchline: Add various in-game events to your Steam Game Recording timeline, comes with instructions for non-steam users!

Team Fortress Fantasy (9)

Description: * Show a Win Panel (with sounds!) when you clear or get wiped in a duty.
* Show a TF2-style timer while in a duty.
* Enable the 'Voice Lines' module (via /tfconfig) to have voice lines play when certain conditions are met. What conditions, you ask? It's a surprise! (Unless you uncheck the 'Surprise me!' box.)
* More features maybe soon?
Note: This plugin uses files from a local Team Fortress 2 installation.
It'll search for the game's installation folder in all configured Steam Library Folders automatically.
Without a TF2 install, the Timer and Win Panel will work with FF XIV fonts, and no voice line will work.

Punchline: [REQUIRES TF2 INSTALLED FOR MOST FEATURES] The Mann Brothers just found a deposit of gravel in Eorzea
and hired YOU, Mercenary of Light, to help them FIGHT for it.

Tags: plugin 

Author URL Version
Berna https://kamori.goats.dev/Plugin/PluginMaster 1.1.7.0

Tidy Chat (14)

Description: It is highly recommended to edit the default settings as you may disagree on which messages should be considered 'spam'!
Provides granular filter options to filter nearly all game-related spam, leaving only important game messages in your chat.
- Filters most spammy game messages
- Blocks emote spam from other players
- Condenses earned commendations into a single line
- Shortens lengthy messages such as joining Novice Network or entering an instanced zone
- Blocks repeated messages from appearing for a period of time
- Automatically copies most 'with your chat mode in /say' quest dialogue to your clipboard
- And more!

Punchline: Better game messages and in-depth chat filters to keep a tidy chat.

Tags: Emote Social 

Author URL Version
Nadya https://kamori.goats.dev/Plugin/PluginMaster 2.1.0.0

Tippy (14)

Description: Developed by goat for April Fools 2021 and unnecessarily resurrected by kal and adopted by Critical-Impact.
Handcrafted by our finest code artisans with special AI,
he will analyze your playstyle to give you useful tips to get your GAMING to the next level.
Some things he can do:
* He can give general tips about the game
* He can give tips about the job you're playing
* He can report on your battle performance
* He will respect your feelings

Punchline: Tippy, your new FFXIV virtual assistant.

Title Edit (14)

Description: Create your own custom title or character select screen of your favorite location in-game, and open the game right up to that spot every time.
Includes a number of preinstalled title and character select screen presets for you to use or get inspiration from, and an easy to use importer to use presets that others have shared!
Character select presets support recording your last visited location, per character display setting and even displaying yourself on a mount.

Punchline: Create, share, and shuffle custom title and character select screens for FFXIV.

Waitingway (14)

Description: Contributes and utilizes crowdsourced login, duty, and roulette queue information for the benefit of everyone.
Current features include queue time estimates and notifications via Discord, so you can know when you make it into the game, as well as anonymously collecting and reporting statistics about your queue times to crowdsource information about FFXIV server load and activity. Join our Discord for more information!
Discord URL: https://waiting.camora.dev/discord

Punchline: Set out for Dawntrail and make your queues a breeze. Waitingway provides crowdsourced FFXIV login queue times, now with Discord queue notification features.

Tags: queue Utility

Weatherman (14)

Description: Features:
- Change in-game time and weather as you desire;
- Perform changes globally or individually per zone;
- Stop undesired weathers from appearing completely.
This plugin only changes visuals: time/weather-related features such as zone background music, vista availability, states of certain objects will remain unaffected.
Only zones with open sky are subject to the changes (not every one of them yet but work in progress).

Punchline: Allows precise control over time and weather per zone or globally.

Wholist (14)

Description: Show nearby players in a stylish way, inspired by the '/who' command from World of Warcraft
Features:
- Minimalistic interface that can be scaled down to become part of your HUD.
- Player context menu items for examining, searching on the Lodestone and more.
- Customizable colours & behaviour.
- Random adventure plate command
- Display nearby player count in the server info bar
Please note this plugin will automatically disable functionality in PvP.

Wrath Combo (14)

Description: Turns one action into many! Similar to how PvP actions work, we take an action and build a whole combo out of it. Sometimes it's as simple as a 1-2-3 combo, other times it's a full job rotation. Either way, you'll find something suited for your rotation needs.

Punchline: Condenses combos and mutually exclusive abilities onto a single button - and then some.

Description: Features:
- Opes a direct message window when you message someone or they message you
- Each window contains your DM chat with certain person
- Open and cycle through recent chats with a hotkey
- Execute emote commands on a player from their DM window without needing to manually target them
- Automatically record your chat log in an easy to read text file
- Fully customizable styles

XIVDeck (14)

Description: This plugin allows players to use an Elgato Stream Deck as a virtual utility hot bar. Actions are called directly, meaning there is no need to set up awkward keybinds, custom macros, or any other settings.
Note that the XIVDeck Stream Deck plugin must also be installed for this plugin to be useful. You can download the Stream Deck plugin from the linked GitHub repository, under the 'Releases' section.
Please report all problems to KazWolfe#2896 in the Dalamud Support server or by opening an Issue on GitHub.

Punchline: Turn your Elgato Stream Deck into a hotbar!

XIVJitterFix (10)

Description: With the release of 7.0 SquareEnix has implemented several temporal antialiasing solutions. However they all have a severe bug that affects image quality significantly.
This plugin will restore using jitter when talking to NPCs or in cutscenes and gpose. Jitter (not noticeable micromovements of the camera) is necessary for temporal antialiasing solutions (DLSS, DLAA, TSCMAA+jitter) to work properly.
For some reason, SquareEnix decided we don't need jitter during the time where the game benefits from using it the most.

Punchline: Fixes SquareEnix' botched antialiasing implementation

Tags: fix 

Author URL Version
darkarchon https://kamori.goats.dev/Plugin/PluginMaster 0.0.0.4

Yes Already (14)

Description: Tired of clicking yes in Praetorium? Can't stand using keys in dungeons? Well do I have the plugin for you! Yes Already is specifically designed to click all the annoying dialogs you've grown accustomed facerolling. Just enter the dialog text, and you'll never see it again! Also works with /regex/ and has several built-in modules for dialogs that aren't quite yes/no prompts but act like it (like desynth).

Punchline: Clicks Yes in various dialogs you've specified.
